name: oneaiworkers
description: A small Cloudflare Worker remote MCP server for LLM-triggered actions.

OAUTH_DB.description: D1 database used by OneAIWorkers to store OAuth, connector registry, connector actions, and audit records. Cloudflare creates it automatically during deployment.

MCP_SHARED_SECRET.description: Required. A private password that protects OAuth connection and manual MCP access. Generate a long random value and keep it secret.
